arts.ttl: Roma vs. Napoli: vital points at stake
arts.sum: After a run of four consecutive home wins against Napoli in Serie A, Roma have won just two of their last eight home league games against the Partenopei, also failing to find the net in three of their most recent four. Artem Dovbyk has scored in each of his last three Serie A appearances; the last Roma to have found the net in four consecutive games in a season in the competition was Henrikh Mkhitaryan in May 2021.

arts.ttl: Galatasaray Make Inquiry About Roma Castaway
arts.sum: Turkish giants Galatasaray have recently inquired about Roma outcast Bryan Cristante, previously linked with Inter. Italian journalist Gianluca Di Marzio claims the Super Lig title favorites intend to add the former Milan midfielder to their ranks this winter. The post Galatasaray Make Inquiry About Roma Castaway appeared first on The Cult of Calcio.

arts.ttl: Report – Napoli Set to Sign Lightning-Fast Saudi Pro League Star
arts.sum: Al-Ahli winger Allan Saint-Maximin is reportedly on the cusp of joining Serie A title hopefuls Napoli on a dry loan. According to Calciomercato, Antonio Conte's side will splash out around €3-4 million to sign the quicksilver forward. The post Report – Napoli Set to Sign Lightning-Fast Saudi Pro League Star appeared first on The Cult of Calcio.

arts.ttl: Galatasaray Express Interest in Roma’s Bryan Cristante
arts.sum: Turkish giants Galatasaray have made an inquiry about Roma midfielder Bryan Cristante, signalling their continued interest in strengthening their squad with talent from the Italian Serie A. The post Galatasaray Express Interest in Roma’s Bryan Cristante appeared first on FootItalia.com.

arts.ttl: Napoli Close in on Saint-Maximin Loan Deal as Transfer Window Heats Up
arts.sum: Napoli's winter transfer window continues to be a hive of activity, with the club now on the verge of securing Allan Saint-Maximin on loan from Al-Ahli. The Italian side is in the final stages of exchanging documents with the Saudi Arabian club for the former Newcastle United winger. The post Napoli Close in on Saint-Maximin Loan Deal as Transfer Window Heats Up appeared first on FootItalia.com.
